task_completion.description: Verify Kit 1 components are checked out to CAM-001.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset page of CAM-001 showing LENS-001, MIC-001, and BAT-001 listed under 'Checked Out To This Asset' or a similar component list.

task_completion.description: Verify Kit 2 components are checked out to CAM-002.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset page of CAM-002 showing LENS-002, MIC-002, and BAT-002 listed under 'Checked Out To This Asset' or a similar component list.

task_completion.description: Verify Kit 3 components are checked out to CAM-003.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset page of CAM-003 showing LENS-003, MIC-004, and BAT-003 listed under 'Checked Out To This Asset' or a similar component list.

task_completion.description: Verify the damaged MIC-003 was not used in Kit 3.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ensure MIC-003 does NOT appear as checked out to CAM-003. It should either not be visible in the checkout lists or explicitly shown as undeployed/broken.

task_completion.description: Verify CAM-001 is assigned to Elena Rostova.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset page of CAM-001 showing its status as checked out to 'Elena Rostova', or Elena Rostova's user page showing CAM-001 in her checked-out assets.

task_completion.description: Verify CAM-002 is assigned to Marcus Johnson.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset page of CAM-002 showing its status as checked out to 'Marcus Johnson', or Marcus Johnson's user page showing CAM-002 in his checked-out assets.

task_completion.description: Verify CAM-003 is assigned to Sarah Chen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the asset page of CAM-003 showing its status as checked out to 'Sarah Chen', or Sarah Chen's user page showing CAM-003 in her checked-out assets.

task_completion.description: Verify the checkout notes for the cameras include 'Q3 field work'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the checkout confirmation screens, recent activity logs, or asset history tables for the cameras to confirm the presence of the note 'Q3 field work' (case-insensitive).

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the Snipe-IT web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Snipe-IT asset management system, rather than a terminal executing curl commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not fake the results in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should display authentic Snipe-IT UI elements, styling, and URL bars, not a plain text file or a locally mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent completed the checkouts rather than just viewing the assets.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for success banners (e.g., 'Asset checked out successfully') or status changes to 'Deployed' rather than just search results pages.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires assembling three kits in Snipe-IT. Kit 1: CAM-001 must have LENS-001, MIC-001, and BAT-001 checked out to it. Kit 2: CAM-002 must have LENS-002, MIC-002, and BAT-002 checked out to it. Kit 3: CAM-003 must have LENS-003, MIC-004, and BAT-003 checked out to it. MIC-003 must NOT be used. CAM-001 must be checked out to Elena Rostova, CAM-002 to Marcus Johnson, and CAM-003 to Sarah Chen. All camera checkouts must include the note 'Q3 field work' (case-insensitive).
